__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  SearchRequestFormatsItem:
    enum:
      - html
      - json
      - markdown
      - csv
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yaml
  WidgetCareTagsItem:
    enum:
      - value: beginner-friendly
        name: BeginnerFriendly
      - value: advanced-care
        name: AdvancedCare
      - value: pet-safe
        name: PetSafe
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yaml
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    search:
      path: /search
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yaml
      request:
        name: SearchRequest
        query-parameters:
          formats:
            type: optional<SearchRequestFormatsItem>
            default:
              - html
            allow-multiple: true
            docs: Output formats to include
          tags:
            type: optional<string>
            default:
              - green
              - leafy
            allow-multiple: true
            docs: Tags to filter by
      response:
        docs: ok
        type: list<string>
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - response:
            body:
              - string
    createWidget:
      path: /widgets
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yaml
      request:
        name: Widget
        body:
          properties:
            name: string
            careTags:
              type: optional<list<WidgetCareTagsItem>>
              docs: Care tags for the widget
              default:
                - beginner-friendly
        content-type: application/json
      examples:
        - request:
            name: name
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yaml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Array enum defaults
